headline: US Regulator Demands FDIC Action on $2T Crypto Risk

article.title: US government watchdog urges FDIC coordinate on crypto oversight
article.summary: The US Government Accountability Office says that regulators, including the FDIC, lack an “ongoing coordination mechanism for addressing blockchain risks.”

headline: Anthropic Shutdown Boosts Decentralized AI Stocks 20% Overnight

article.title: Anthropic shutdown makes a strong case for decentralized AI: Grayscale
article.summary: Grayscale says decentralized AI tokens gained after the US government ordered Anthropic to cut access to its latest AI models, showing user demand for alternatives to centralized AI.

headline: Australia's 1.66 Fertility Rate Sparks Labor Shortage Fears

article.title: Australia Grapples with Demographic Shifts: Falling Fertility, Immigration
article.summary: While the anti-immigration One Nation party is gaining traction in opinion polls, Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has resisted calls for deeper cuts to migrant intake. headline: Central Banks Boost Gold Reserves 25% This Year

article.title: More Central Banks Than Ever Say They Will Buy Gold This Year
article.summary: More central banks than ever expect to increase their gold reserves, a sign one of the key forces behind bullion’s record-breaking rally remains intact despite this year’s pullback.

article.title: Elon Musk Loses Again to OpenAI as Judge Dismisses xAI Trade Secret Lawsuit
article.summary: A federal judge handed Elon Musk his second defeat against OpenAI after finding xAI failed to show OpenAI improperly obtained confidential info.

headline: Pudgy Penguins NFT Game Folds After 9 Months

article.summary: Pudgy Party, a mobile battle royale game, has closed up shop as the Pudgy Penguins team shifts its focus to its Pudgy World experience.
